---
title: "About me"
description: |
   Hi, I'm Alex. I'm a biostatistician & neuroscientist and this is my personal website.
  
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

I received my PhD in Neuroscience at the University of Colorado Anschutz Medical Campus in September 2020 and then began graduate studies in Statistics at Texas A&M University. I now get to provide statistical analysis support to researchers in public health, genomics, and epidemiology in my work as a biostatistician at Westat.


My previous neuroscience research is described on my [Research](research.html) page. 


I also really like [running](misc.html), [taking pictures of my cat](cauchy.html), [painting](page.html) and scientific illustration, and board games. I built this website with the R package {Distill}, which you can learn more about [here](https://rstudio.github.io/distill/).
